subject: Re: Additional Information Needed
body_text:
I have no idea what the process is like to get it "verified, complete,
accepted by the IRS".

So when you say "accepted" do you mean you want the priority mail tracking
number, or do you want a LITERAL IRS officer to certify it? The estimated
wait time to get to see an IRS employee at the Taxpayer Assistance Center
to get such a certification is 30-60 days, which would certainly put us
past the time that we're supposed to vacate the residence. This seems to be
opposite of the guidance that I was presented by your office less than a
year ago with Ariana Stalcup, that contains the actual income verification
requirements. It's also amusing quite frankly, because not once have I ever
seen your office demand Julio Cortez ever produce an IRS 1040, much less
have some sort of acceptance letter from the IRS, given that he claims he
is going to be in the blossom are you also requiring him to turn in a form
1040?

body_html:
I have no idea what the process is like to get it "verified, complete, accepted by the IRS". 

So when you say "accepted" do you mean you want the priority mail tracking number, or do you want a LITERAL IRS officer to certify it? The estimated wait time to get to see an IRS employee at the Taxpayer Assistance Center to get such a certification is 30-60 days, which would certainly put us past the time that we're supposed to vacate the residence. This seems to be opposite of the guidance that I was presented by your office less than a year ago with Ariana Stalcup, that contains the actual income verification requirements. It's also amusing quite frankly, because not once have I ever seen your office demand Julio Cortez ever produce an IRS 1040, much less have some sort of acceptance letter from the IRS, given that he claims he is going to be in the blossom are you also requiring him to turn in a form 1040?


======

======

======

Hello,

 

Please see the attached. This will also be mailed to you today.

Kati
